query: SELECT DISTINCT masterServiceTypeId FROM jobs WHERE masterServiceTypeId IS NOT NULL LIMIT 20; SELECT * FROM master_service_types LIMIT 10; SELECT * FROM master_artist_types LIMIT 10;
